image:image.image:title: Avyxon AI Labs — Agentic Automation & 1-Week MVPs
image:image.image:caption: Ship faster. Automate deeper. Lead with AI. Production-ready MVPs in 1–4 weeks from an agent-first engineering studio. Key stats: 1-week fastest MVP, 70% faster than agencies, 10K+ centers managed, 99.5% SLA adherence.
